title: Hub v2 Model Source
description: Per-source entry inside a HubModel.sources[] list. Models stay parallel to MCP packages[]: one model can ship from multiple registries (huggingface / s3 / url / local) and each source advertises its own file format, runtime hint, context window, optional environment variables, and its own list of quantizations.

identifier.description: Source-specific identifier: a HuggingFace repo path (e.g. 'meta-llama/Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct-GGUF'), an S3 path, or a direct URL.

version.description: Source-specific revision (e.g. a Git branch/tag/commit, an S3 object version). Use 'main' when unpinned.

fileFormat.description: On-disk file format produced by this source.

runtimeHint.description: Suggested local runtime for this source's files (e.g. 'llamacpp', 'mistralrs').

contextLength.description: Native context length for this source's checkpoint. Per-source because different distributions of the same model can ship different windows.

environmentVariables.description: Source-time environment variables (e.g. HUGGINGFACE_API_KEY for gated repos). Same shape used by McpPackage.environmentVariables and the various MCP transports — see key-value-input.schema.json.

quantizations.description: One or more concrete file variants the user can pick from. Single-file models still list a single entry here.

name.description: Quantization label as it appears to the user (e.g. 'Q4_K_M', 'Q5_K_M', 'f16', 'fp16').

mainFile.description: File-format entrypoint name inside the source repo / package.

sizeGb.description: On-disk size in GiB; informational, used by the FE for the download confirmation prompt.

fileSha256.description: Optional SHA-256 over the main file for download integrity verification.

isDefault.description: Exactly one quantization per source SHOULD have isDefault=true; consumers pick that one absent an explicit user choice.
